column1: # LADDER MECHANICS (off-bridge validation): ROLLOVER PROVEN on-chain — factory rotated in-place to a new
#   epoch via close->refund (d766282 -> 09762ddd); LSP log: "rotation complete, new factory active with 4
#   channels". Offline-tolerance ALSO proven: with all 4 clients offline the LSP correctly REFUSED the next
#   rotation ("< 2 clients departed, cannot rotate") — the safety guard, not a hang. Corrected finding:
#   taking ALL clients offline blocks the rotation quorum, so it does NOT yield a proactive distribution;
#   that was a harness-design error, not a protocol gap. Realistic exhibit B therefore = rotate 1x (clients
#   ONLINE) -> COOP CLOSE; the timeout->distribution is shown separately by the non-rotated
#   distribution-at-expiry run. Ladder factory-1 (09762ddd, 600k) expired; recoverable via seed
